top3.sql:
SELECT MAX(y.Consumption) AS BiggestMonthlyConsumption
FROM yearmonth y
JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Currency = 'Euro';

SELECT MAX(y.Consumption) AS biggest_monthly_consumption
FROM yearmonth y
JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Currency = 'Euro';

SELECT MAX(y.Consumption) AS BiggestMonthlyConsumption
FROM yearmonth y
JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Currency = 'Euro';

WITH euro_customers AS (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM customers
    WHERE Currency = 'Euro'
)
SELECT MAX(Consumption) AS BiggestMonthlyConsumption
FROM yearmonth
WHERE CustomerID IN (SELECT CustomerID FROM euro_customers);

SELECT MAX(Consumption) AS biggest_monthly_consumption
FROM yearmonth
WHERE CustomerID IN (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM customers
    WHERE Currency = 'Euro'
);

SELECT MAX(y.Consumption) AS BiggestMonthlyConsumption
FROM yearmonth y
JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Currency = 'Euro';

WITH euro_customers AS (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM customers
    WHERE Currency = 'Euro'
)
SELECT MAX(Consumption) AS BiggestMonthlyConsumption
FROM yearmonth
WHERE CustomerID IN (SELECT CustomerID FROM euro_customers);

SELECT MAX(Consumption) AS biggest_monthly_consumption
FROM yearmonth
WHERE CustomerID IN (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM customers
    WHERE Currency = 'Euro'
);

final.sql:
SELECT MAX(y.Consumption) AS BiggestMonthlyConsumption
FROM yearmonth y
JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Currency = 'Euro';
